name: vanity-number-app
description: Production-oriented AWS serverless vanity number application for Amazon Connect.

scripts.build:all: npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.sam:build: SAM_BIN=$(command -v sam || printf .tools/bin/sam) && HOME=/tmp SAM_CLI_TELEMETRY=0 PATH="$PWD/backend/node_modules/.bin:$PATH" "$SAM_BIN" build --template-file backend/template.yaml
scripts.sam:validate: SAM_BIN=$(command -v sam || printf .tools/bin/sam) && HOME=/tmp SAM_CLI_TELEMETRY=0 "$SAM_BIN" validate --lint --template-file backend/template.yaml
